name: Lentivirus Concentration by PEG Precipitation and Ultracentrifugation
nameCn: PEG 沉淀结合超速离心浓缩慢病毒

usage.en: Concentrate lentiviral supernatant by PEG precipitation followed by ultracentrifugation when higher titer is needed for difficult-to-infect cells.
usage.zh: 使用 PEG 沉淀结合超速离心浓缩慢病毒上清，在原代细胞或难感染细胞需要更高滴度时使用。

note.en: PEG 8000 is most common; PEG 6000 or PEG 4000 can also be used if already validated in-house.
note.zh: 最常用 PEG8000；若实验室已有验证方案，也可使用 PEG6000 或 PEG4000。

materials.name: SW 32 Ti rotor or equivalent swing-bucket rotor

components.name: 1. Collect lentiviral supernatant and filter through 0.45 µm membrane

note.en: Remove cells and debris before concentration.
note.zh: 先去除细胞和碎片，再进行浓缩。

components.name: 2. Add 40% PEG stock to final PEG concentration of 10%; incubate on ice for 3–6 h

note.en: Mix gently but thoroughly. Avoid foaming.
note.zh: 轻柔但充分混匀，避免起泡。

note.en: A visible pellet may be loose; handle carefully after spin.
note.zh: 沉淀可能较松散，离心后操作要轻。

components.name: 4. Discard supernatant and resuspend pellet in PBS using 1/20 of the original sample volume

note.en: Resuspend completely before the next concentration step.
note.zh: 进入下一步前要把沉淀充分重悬。

components.name: 5. Transfer resuspended virus into sterile ultracentrifuge tube and balance with PBS

note.en: Use matched tubes and precise balancing for rotor safety.
note.zh: 使用配对离心管并精确配平，保证转头安全。

components.name: 6. Load tubes into SW 32 Ti buckets

note.en: Keep samples cold and use the rotor limits recommended by the manufacturer.
note.zh: 全程低温操作，并遵守转头厂家规定的转速上限。

components.name: 8. Carefully remove supernatant without disturbing viral pellet

note.en: Decant or aspirate slowly; the pellet may be invisible.
note.zh: 可缓慢倒出或吸走上清；病毒沉淀可能肉眼不明显。

components.name: 9. Resuspend pellet in PBS or viral storage buffer and pool samples if needed

note.en: Use the smallest practical volume to maximize final titer.
note.zh: 尽量用较小体积重悬，以获得更高终滴度。

note.en: PEG-mixed supernatant can remain on ice or at 4°C for several hours before centrifugation.
note.zh: 加入 PEG 后的病毒上清可在冰上或 4°C 放置数小时后再离心。

note.en: Aliquoted virus can be stored at −80°C for long-term use; avoid multiple freeze-thaw cycles.
note.zh: 分装后的病毒可长期保存在 −80°C；避免多次冻融。

detailedSteps.en: Collect lentiviral supernatant from producer cells and filter through a 0.45 µm membrane to remove cells and debris.
detailedSteps.zh: 收集包装细胞产生的慢病毒上清，并用 0.45 µm 滤膜过滤，去除细胞和细胞碎片。

detailedSteps.en: Add 40% PEG stock solution to the filtered supernatant so that the final PEG concentration is 10%. PEG 8000 is most common, but PEG 6000 or PEG 4000 may also be used if validated. Mix gently and incubate on ice for 3–6 h.
detailedSteps.zh: 向过滤后的病毒上清中加入 40% PEG 母液，使最终 PEG 浓度达到 10%。最常用的是 PEG8000，若实验室已有验证也可用 PEG6000 或 PEG4000。轻柔混匀后在冰上孵育 3–6 小时。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge the PEG-incubated supernatant at 2,000×g for 30 min to pellet the PEG-precipitated viral material.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 PEG 处理后的病毒上清以 2,000×g 离心 30 min，使 PEG 沉淀下来的病毒物质成团。

detailedSteps.en: Carefully discard the supernatant. Resuspend the pellet thoroughly in PBS using 1/20 of the original sample volume.
detailedSteps.zh: 小心弃去上清。用 PBS 以原始样品体积的 1/20 充分重悬沉淀。

detailedSteps.en: Transfer the resuspended virus into pre-sterilized ultracentrifuge tubes and balance with PBS. Place tubes into SW 32 Ti buckets.
detailedSteps.zh: 将重悬后的病毒样品转入预先灭菌的超速离心管中，并用 PBS 配平。将离心管放入 SW 32 Ti 吊桶。

detailedSteps.en: Load the SW 32 Ti rotor into an ultracentrifuge such as Optima XPN-100 and centrifuge at 100,000×g (about 24,500 rpm) for 90 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 SW 32 Ti 转头装入超速离心机（如 Optima XPN-100），以 100,000×g（约 24,500 rpm）离心 90 min。

detailedSteps.en: Carefully decant or aspirate the supernatant. Do not disturb the viral pellet, which may be faint or invisible.
detailedSteps.zh: 小心倾倒或吸去上清，不要扰动病毒沉淀；沉淀可能很淡甚至肉眼不可见。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend the pellet in PBS or viral storage buffer. Pool samples from multiple tubes if desired, using the smallest practical volume.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 PBS 或病毒保存液重悬沉淀。如有需要，可将多个管中的样品合并，并尽量使用较小体积。

detailedSteps.en: Aliquot the concentrated virus into single-use tubes and store at −80°C. Avoid repeated freeze-thaw cycles because they reduce infectivity.
detailedSteps.zh: 将浓缩后的病毒分装成单次使用小份，置于 −80°C 保存。避免反复冻融，因为这会降低感染活性。

briefSteps.en: Filter supernatant → add PEG to 10% and incubate on ice → centrifuge 2,000×g 30 min → resuspend pellet in 1/20 PBS → ultracentrifuge 100,000×g 90 min → resuspend → aliquot at −80°C
briefSteps.zh: 过滤病毒上清 → 加 PEG 至终浓度 10% 并冰上孵育 → 2,000×g 离心 30 min → 用 1/20 体积 PBS 重悬 → 100,000×g 超速离心 90 min → 重悬 → 分装后 −80°C 保存

notes.en: This method is useful when the starting lentiviral titer is not enough for primary cells or otherwise difficult-to-infect targets. PEG precipitation is convenient but may co-precipitate proteins and impurities, so the follow-up ultracentrifugation step helps improve concentration and cleanliness. If maximum purity is more important than convenience, a sucrose cushion method is often preferable.
notes.zh: 当原始慢病毒滴度不足以感染原代细胞或其他难感染细胞时，此法很实用。PEG 沉淀操作方便，但也容易把蛋白和杂质一起沉下来，因此后续超速离心有助于进一步提高浓度和纯度。如果更看重纯度而不是操作便捷性，通常更推荐蔗糖垫液法。

ref: Tiscornia et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:241–245; Boroujeni & Gardaneh (2018) Mol Biotechnol 60:185–193

label.zh: 实验方案 — 6–10 小时，实操: 1–1.5 小时
